samples.xml_description:
<module id="multi_16bit">
    <description>Implement an unsigned 16-bit multiplier using shift and accumulate operations.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock signal.</input>
        <input id="rst_n">Active-low reset signal.</input>
        <input id="start">Chip enable signal to initiate multiplication.</input>
        <input id="ain" width_description="[15:0]">Multiplicand input.</input>
        <input id="bin" width_description="[15:0]">Multiplier input.</input>
        <output id="yout" width_description="[31:0]">Product output.</output>
        <output id="done">Completion flag indicating the end of multiplication.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <parameter id="i">Shift count register, 0 to 16.</parameter>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description>
        <sequential_logic id="i">
            <description>Shift count register updated at the positive edge of the clock or the negative edge of the reset.</description>
            <statement>
                <if>
                    <condition><negation><port id="rst_n"/></negation></condition>
                    <then>
                        <assignment>
                            <left><id id="i"/></left>
                            <right>0</right>
                        </assignment>
                    </then>
                    <else>
                        <assignment>
                            <left><id id="i"/></left>
                            <right>
                                <binary>
                                    <condition><and>
                                        <term><id id="start"/></term>
                                        <term><id id="i"/> <operator><leq/> <number>16</number></term>
                                    </condition>
                                    <term><id id="i"/> + 1</term>
                                </binary>
                            </right>
                        </assignment>
                    </else>
                </if>
            </statement>
        </sequential_logic>
        <sequential_logic id="done_r">
            <description>Completion flag updated at the positive edge of the clock or the negative edge of the reset.</description>
            <statement>
                <if>
                    <condition><negation><port id="rst_n"/></negation></condition>
                    <then>
                        <assignment>
                            <left><id id="done_r"/></left>
                            <right>0</right>
                        </assignment>
                    </then>
                    <else>
                        <assignment>
                            <left><id id="done_r"/></left>
                            <right>
                                <binary>
                                    <condition><and>
                                        <term><id id="i"/> == 16</term>
                                        <term><id id="start"/> == 1</term>
                                    </condition>
                                    <term>1</term>
                                </binary>
                            </right>
                        </assignment>
                    </else>
                </if>
            </statement>
        </sequential_logic>
        <sequential_logic id="yout_r">
            <description>Product register updated at the positive edge of the clock or the negative edge of the reset.</description>
            <statement>
                <if>
                    <condition><negation><port id="rst_n"/></negation></condition>
                    <then>
                        <assignment>
                            <left><id id="yout_r"/></left>
                            <right>0</right>
                        </assignment>
                    </then>
                    <else>
                        <assignment>
                            <left><id id="yout_r"/></left>
                            <right>
                                <binary>
                                    <condition><and>
                                        <term><id id="start"/></term>
                                        <term><id id="i"/> < operator><leq/> <number>16</number></term>
                                    </condition>
                                    <term>
                                        <condition><if>
                                            <term><id id="i"/> == 0</term>
                                            <then><id id="ain"/></term>
                                            <else>
                                                <condition><and>
                                                    <term><id id="i"/> > 0</term>
                                                    <term><id id="i"/> < operator><leq/> <number>16</number></term>
                                                </condition>
                                                <term>
                                                    <binary>
                                                        <term><id id="yout_r"/></term>
                                                        <operator>+</operator>
                                                        <term><id id="bin"/> << <operator>-</operator> <id id="i"/> << 1'b1</term>
                                                    </binary>
                                                </term>
                                            </else>
                                        </if>
                                    </term>
                                </binary>
                            </right>
                        </assignment>
                    </else>
                </if>
            </statement>
        </sequential_logic>
    </logic_description>
    <implementation>
        <description>On the positive edge of the clock, assign the value of the temporary output (yout_r) to the output (yout).</description>
        <assignment>
            <left><port id="yout"/></left>
            <right><id id="yout_r"/></right>
        </assignment>
    </implementation>
</module>
samples.tb_log:

      |                                     ^~
